name: The Daily Default
reason: The four-piece rotation that needs zero thought — tee, jeans, Samba, and the Santos, worn more than anything else I own.

name: Office Standard
reason: Oxford and wool trousers read as considered without a blazer; the penny loafer keeps the formality without stiffness.

name: Dinner, No Effort
reason: White poplin and black trousers with the Reverso and Santal 33 — the outfit for a dinner reservation, not a boardroom.

name: Cold Commute
reason: The turtleneck under the coat is the only combination warm enough for a genuinely cold morning without adding bulk.

name: Weekend Errand
reason: Court runners and a field watch — this is the outfit that says I'm not trying, deliberately.

name: Friction Piece
reason: Formal tailoring grounded by court runners — the contrast is the entire point, not an accident.

name: Travel Day
reason: Nothing here needs ironing after eight hours in a seat, and the Samba is the one shoe that reads correct at both ends of the journey.

name: Summer Formal
reason: Linen and cream chino are the only combination that stays presentable through actual heat.

name: Date Night
reason: White shirt and dark denim reads considered without looking like I dressed for an interview.

name: University Uniform
reason: The version of the daily default built for a full day on campus — nothing here needs adjusting between a lecture and the walk after.

name: Airport
reason: A soft waistband, layers that come off in one motion, and the Samba — nothing here fights a security line or a long flight.

name: Rain Grounded
reason: The one outfit built to survive a sudden downpour without changing anything else about how I dress.

name: Smart Weekend
reason: Cream knit and dark denim under the Harrington — dressed up enough for a weekend lunch without trying.

name: Half-Zip Evening
reason: The half-zip gives just enough structure for an evening that isn't formal but shouldn't look careless either.

name: Cold Weekend Layer
reason: Turtleneck, denim, and the coat over everything — the outfit for a cold weekend that still needs to look considered.
